goal: Implement complete runtime parity without scaffolding for Convex Go sync client.

steps.name: Pin Rust runtime baseline
steps.description: Capture exact convex-rs commit and sync_types baseline used for this pass.
success_factors: All parity decisions traceable to baseline

steps.name: Generate gap matrix
steps.description: Map current Go runtime behavior to expected Rust behavior at function-level granularity.
success_factors: Each gap mapped to target behavior

steps.name: Freeze scaffold inventory
steps.description: Create and lock a runtime scaffold inventory file covering code paths requiring replacement.

steps.name: Add no-scaffold CI guard
steps.description: Add CI and local checks that fail when forbidden scaffold markers appear in runtime code paths.

steps.name: Document target runtime architecture
steps.description: Document final layering: protocol model, transport manager, base state, worker loop, public API facade.

steps.name: Implement strict protocol identifiers
steps.description: Replace loose protocol identifiers with strict typed IDs and conversion helpers.

steps.name: Implement state version and timestamp encoding
steps.description: Implement strict StateVersion model and timestamp base64 helpers compatible with wire behavior.

steps.name: Implement typed Query and QuerySetModification models
steps.description: Replace map-like payload handling with strict Add/Remove query-set modification modeling.
success_factors: Add and Remove variants are explicit

steps.name: Implement typed StateModification models
steps.description: Model QueryUpdated, QueryFailed, and QueryRemoved explicitly with strict field semantics.

steps.name: Implement typed AuthenticationToken variants
steps.description: Implement Admin/User/None token variants and acting-as payload handling.

steps.name: Implement ClientMessage Connect variant
steps.description: Implement strict Connect shape with required and optional fields and defaults.

steps.name: Implement remaining ClientMessage variants
steps.description: Implement ModifyQuerySet, Mutation, Action, Authenticate, and Event client variants.
success_factors: Roundtrip tests pass for all variants

steps.name: Implement ServerMessage Transition and Chunk variants
steps.description: Implement strict Transition and TransitionChunk server variants with full field typing.

steps.name: Implement remaining ServerMessage variants
steps.description: Implement MutationResponse, ActionResponse, AuthError, FatalError, and Ping variants.

steps.name: Implement strict client codec encode path
steps.description: Replace permissive marshal logic with strict client variant encoder and field validation.
success_factors: Encode output matches expected wire keys

steps.name: Implement strict client codec decode path
steps.description: Implement strict decoder for client messages with defaulting and compatibility behavior.
success_factors: Malformed payloads fail with stable errors

steps.name: Implement strict server codec encode path
steps.description: Implement strict server encoder for transitions and response unions.

steps.name: Implement strict server codec decode path
steps.description: Implement strict decoder for server variants including optional/null edge behavior.
success_factors: Null vs missing fields handled correctly

steps.name: Add malformed protocol corpus tests
steps.description: Create a corpus of malformed inputs covering missing fields, wrong types, and unknown variants.

steps.name: Import Rust fixture vectors
steps.description: Add reproducible fixture import path from rust baseline for protocol/value conformance.

steps.name: Run fixture conformance gate
steps.description: Validate Go codec behavior against imported fixture vectors and fail on drift.

steps.name: Add codec fuzzing gate
steps.description: Add fuzz tests for protocol and value codecs seeded from fixtures and malformed corpus.

steps.name: Implement websocket dial handshake
steps.description: Implement production websocket dial with headers, cancellation, and handshake failure propagation.

steps.name: Implement websocket connect message path
steps.description: Send strict Connect payload on open/reconnect with correct metadata and timestamp encoding.
success_factors: Connect message emitted once per connection

steps.name: Implement websocket write queue loop
steps.description: Implement queued writer loop ensuring ordering and non-blocking API behavior.

steps.name: Implement websocket read loop
steps.description: Implement reader loop decoding server frames and classifying close/decode/protocol failures.

steps.name: Implement heartbeat ping ticker
steps.description: Implement heartbeat schedule and ping message handling.

steps.name: Implement inactivity watchdog
steps.description: Trigger reconnect on server inactivity threshold breaches.

steps.name: Implement reconnect backoff jitter parity
steps.description: Align reconnect backoff growth, cap, jitter, and reset behavior with parity expectations.

steps.name: Implement websocket state callback ordering
steps.description: Emit state transitions in deterministic order across connect, failure, and reconnect cycles.

steps.name: Add transport integration tests
steps.description: Validate open, send, read, heartbeat, inactivity, and reconnect using a controllable websocket test server.
success_factors: Tests are stable under race detector

steps.name: Finalize RequestManager semantics
steps.description: Implement mutation/action completion semantics and replay ordering consistent with target behavior.

steps.name: Finalize LocalSyncState semantics
steps.description: Implement dedupe, subscriber lifecycle, query/identity versioning, and observed timestamp behavior.
success_factors: Dedupe and subscriber mapping are correct

steps.name: Implement strict transition apply logic
steps.description: Apply transitions with start/end version checks and reconnect on mismatch.

steps.name: Implement TransitionChunk assembly
steps.description: Implement chunk buffering, ordering checks, completion assembly, and decoded transition processing.

steps.name: Finalize auth callback refresh semantics
steps.description: Implement immediate auth callback fetch and reconnect refresh with force_refresh semantics.

steps.name: Implement replay queue rebuild
steps.description: Clear stale queue and rebuild replay set for auth, query set, and in-flight requests after reconnect.

steps.name: Define worker command and event model
steps.description: Create strict worker command/event types connecting API calls, transport responses, and state updates.

steps.name: Implement worker main loop
steps.description: Implement dedicated worker loop integrating transport events and API commands with deterministic ordering.

steps.name: Implement flush-before-select behavior
steps.description: Ensure queued outbound replay and critical messages flush before normal select processing.

steps.name: Implement communicate-during-send behavior
steps.description: Ensure worker continues processing inbound protocol events while waiting on send completion.

steps.name: Implement protocol-failure reconnect propagation
steps.description: Propagate protocol failures into reconnect requests with reason and max observed timestamp.

steps.name: Wire public Subscribe and Query through worker
steps.description: Route Subscribe and Query API calls through worker-managed runtime and real sync state.

steps.name: Wire public Mutation and Action through worker
steps.description: Route Mutation and Action through worker/request manager semantics with strict completion behavior.

steps.name: Wire watch_all, clone, and lifecycle semantics
steps.description: Implement consistent snapshots for watch_all and shared-runtime clone/close behavior.

steps.name: Wire auth APIs through worker runtime
steps.description: Route set_auth and set_auth_callback through worker with correct reconnect replay behavior.

steps.name: Expand live integration suite
steps.description: Add live deployment tests for query, subscribe, mutation, action, reconnect, and auth refresh scenarios.
success_factors: Live suite covers critical runtime flows

steps.name: Run scaffold-zero audit and final parity gate
steps.description: Close all scaffold inventory entries and run final full validation gate (unit, race, fixtures, live).

ordering_policy: Execute steps strictly in listed order.
